mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at, room_image ) VALUES ( #{room_id}, #{room_type}, #{festival_id}, #{owner_id}, #{room_title}, #{room_description}, #{free_location}, TO_DATE(#{free_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{max_capacity}, SYSDATE, #{room_image} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, res.* FROM ( SELECT cr.room_id AS "room_id", LOWER(cr.room_type) AS "room_type", cr.festival_id AS "festival_id", cr.owner_id AS "owner_id", cr.room_title AS "room_title", cr.room_description AS "room_description", cr.free_location AS "free_location", TO_CHAR(cr.free_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "free_date", cr.max_capacity AS "max_capacity", TO_CHAR(cr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "created_at", cr.room_image AS "room_image", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image_url AS "profile_image_url", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS "current_count" FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'GROUP' ORDER BY cr.room_id DESC ) res ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room WHERE room_type = 'GROUP'

choose.otherwise:
SELECT #{roomId} AS "room_id", 'FESTIVAL' AS "room_type", fi.content_id AS "festival_id", NULL AS "owner_id", fi.title || ' 공식 모임' AS "room_title", NVL(fi.overview, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다. 함께 갈 메이트를 구해보세요!') AS "room_description", fi.addr1 AS "free_location", fi.event_start_date || ' ~ ' || fi.event_end_date AS "free_date", 500 AS "max_capacity",
SYSDATE AS "created_at",
NULL AS "nickname", NULL AS "profile_image_url", fi.first_image AS "room_image", 0 AS "current_count" FROM festival_info fi WHERE fi.content_id = ABS(#{roomId})

mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id AS "member_id", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image_url AS "profile_image_url" FROM chat_room_user cru JOIN member m ON cru.member_id = m.member_id JOIN chat_room cr ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cru.room_id = #{room_id} AND (cr.owner_id IS NULL OR cru.member_id != cr.owner_id)
SELECT max_capacity AS "MAX_CAPACITY", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = #{room_id}) AS "CURRENT_COUNT" FROM chat_room WHERE room_id = #{room_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER WHERE room_id = #{room_id} AND member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, res.* FROM ( SELECT cr.room_id AS "room_id", LOWER(cr.room_type) AS "room_type", cr.festival_id AS "festival_id", cr.owner_id AS "owner_id", m.nickname AS "nickname", NVL(cr.room_title, fi.title || ' 공식 모임') AS "room_title", NVL(cr.room_description, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다.') AS "room_description", NVL(cr.free_location, fi.addr1) AS "free_location", NVL(TO_CHAR(cr.free_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), fi.event_start_date || ' ~ ' || fi.event_end_date) AS "free_date", cr.max_capacity AS "max_capacity", NVL(cr.room_image, fi.first_image) AS "room_image", TO_CHAR(cru.joined_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "joined_at", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user sub_cru WHERE sub_cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS "current_count" FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_room_user cru ON cr.room_id = cru.room_id LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON cr.festival_id = fi.content_id LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cru.member_id = #{memberId} AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' AND cr.room_type = 'GROUP' AND cr.owner_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY cru.joined_at DESC ) res ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_room_user cru ON cr.room_id = cru.room_id WHERE cru.member_id = #{memberId} AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' AND cr.room_type = 'GROUP' AND cr.owner_id = #{memberId}
